'''Unit 416''' was a [[B1-series battle droid]] member of [[MT-7's unit]] while it was deployed to [[Akiva]], a [[jungle]] [[planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories|Outer Rim]], during the [[Clone Wars]]. During the war, at the onset of the monsoon season the unit was split and deployed to the field. Unit 416 eventually made it to the separatist's northern base, west of [[Sashin]], where they placed detonators around the base to prevent it from falling into enemy hands. However the monsoon has damaged their [[actuator]]s and Unit 416 was destroyed in the blast.<ref name="Outlaws" /> 

{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars Outlaws|canon=1}}
Over twenty [[Standard year|years]] later, in [[3 ABY]],<ref name="OutlawsDate">{{OutlawsDate}}</ref> a [[Scoundrel/Legends|scoundrel]] named [[Kay Vess]] met the still active yet immobilized [[MT-7]] in an [[Abandoned Hideout|abandoned hideout]] in the [[Karaba Foothills]] on Akiva. After impersonating a member of [[CIS Special Operations]], MT-7 request that Vess help locate his men. Vess eventually made her way to the ruins of the northern base and found Unit 416's remains and their last data entry.<ref name="Outlaws" /> 
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Unit 416 appeared in "The Veteran" side mission in the [[2024]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Outlaws]]'', developed by [[Massive Entertainment]] and published by [[Ubisoft]].<ref name="Outlaws" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Outlaws]]'' {{1st}}
